description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12) and the latest Poetry version. Check out the repository, set up Python, install uv, sync project dependencies, lint with flake8, and run automated tests with pytest.
